raw_result.description: Work management platform with tasks, docs, goals, chat, and project automation exposed through a public developer API.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official developer docs show OAuth token exchange and also mention using a Personal API Token for requests; the browser-gathered evidence did not verify any separate API key or basic auth method.
raw_result.gating_reason: Public ClickUp developer documentation is openly accessible and the evidence gathered did not show a contact-sales, partner, or admin approval gate for obtaining API credentials.

api_surface.breadth: Public v2 REST API with standard HTTP methods and multiple documented reference sections, indicating broad workspace/task/project management coverage, but exact endpoint breadth was not fully inventoried from gathered evidence.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official ClickUp MCP server or official MCP guidance was verified in the gathered evidence.

raw_result.blocker: Some important support-page evidence for rate limits and plan-specific access appeared to 404 during browsing, so a first toolkit looks feasible from public REST docs and auth docs, but some operational details remain insufficiently verified from the gathered evidence.
raw_result.rate_limit_notes: A ClickUp Help Center rate-limit article URL was surfaced during browsing, suggesting official rate-limit documentation exists, but the page appeared as 404 in the gathered session, so specific numeric limits and plan-based differences were not reliably verified.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official developer portal is live; browser evidence specifically noted OAuth and Personal API Token auth, and standard REST methods such as GET/POST/PUT/DELETE were visible in the reference flow. The surfaced rate-limit help URL indicates operational guidance likely exists even though it was not successfully captured.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Need human verification for exact rate-limit numbers, any plan-based API access restrictions, and whether an official or widely adopted ClickUp MCP server exists, because gathered browsing evidence on those points was incomplete or inconclusive.
